Table of Contents

Interface ISeamlineTaskInfo3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control information defining a seamline task.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("CC9166CD-9C74-430A-A1B5-3DF176447A03")]
public interface ISeamlineTaskInfo3 : ISeamlineTaskInfo2, ISeamlineTaskInfo

Properties

BaseSeamline

The base seamline which is used to create the final seamline.

IGeometry BaseSeamline { get; set; }

Property Value

IGeometry
